description_long: This is a black MSI gaming laptop with a red-backlit keyboard and a matte finish. The screen is open and off, with a wide black bezel and the MSI logo centered below the display. The keyboard features a standard QWERTY layout with a numeric keypad, and the touchpad is positioned slightly left of center. The laptop lid displays a prominent MSI dragon shield logo in red and white. The chassis appears to be made of plastic with some metallic elements, and the overall design is sleek and angular, typical of gaming laptops. Various ports are visible along the sides, and there are stickers on the right palm rest area.
description: A black MSI gaming laptop with a red-backlit keyboard, matte finish, and a prominent MSI logo on the lid. The screen is open and off, and the keyboard includes a numeric keypad.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen, red-backlit keyboard, touchpad, and MSI logo below the display.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, red keyboard, and visible side ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed lid with the MSI dragon shield logo centered.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the red keyboard, side ports, and the laptop's slim design.
attribute_brand_logo: A red and white MSI dragon shield logo is visible on the center of the laptop lid, with a smaller MSI logo below the screen on the front bezel.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and numeric keypad, red backlighting, and standard key arrangement.
attribute_sticker_placement: Stickers are present on the right palm rest area, including a rectangular sticker with text and graphics.
